articles.title: Solana Price Prediction as SOL Becomes 10th Most Traded Coin on the Market – Can SOL Reach $100 This Year?
articles.description: SOL, the cryptocurrency that powers the high-performance smart-contract-enabled Solana blockchain, has been edging lower in tandem with the broader cryptocurrency market on Monday and price predictions are becoming more pessimistic. Despite the uninspired price action, a lot of trading is taking place under the hood. According to CoinMarketCap, Solana saw more than $600 million in trade...

articles.title: Cardano Whales, Sharks Have Accumulated 406M ADA In 2023: Santiment
articles.description: Data from Santiment shows Cardano whales and sharks have been busy accumulating this year as they have added almost 406 million ADA to their holdings. Cardano Whales And Sharks Have Been Accumulating Since The Start Of 2023 As per data from the on-chain analytics firm Santiment, whale transaction activity has recently been the highest for the coin since the collapse of the crypto exchange FTX....
